title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Expands in Florida With Caton-Hosey Buyout
text: Brown & Brown (BRO) signs an agreement to acquire Caton-Hosey, boosting its presence in Florida.

title: AIG Rises 9.6% in Three Months: What Lies Ahead for Investors?
text: American International (AIG) continues to streamline its operations by axing non-core businesses, focusing on core insurance to improve profitability.

title: Brown & Brown, Inc. enters into agreement to acquire Caton-Hosey Insurance
text: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla., Dec. 26, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- J. Scott Penny, chief acquisitions officer of Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO), and Rex Caton and John Hosey, the owners of Caton-Hosey Insurance (“Caton Hosey”), today announced that Brown & Brown has entered into an agreement to acquire the assets of Caton Hosey. The transaction is expected to close in early January 2024, subject to certain closing conditions.

title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Unit Expands in Automotive Aftermarket
text: Brown & Brown's (BRO) subsidiary, Brown & Brown Dealer Services' buyout of ABS is set to boost its presence in the warranty solutions marketplace.

title: Pick Up in Service Sector Activity a Boon for These 5 Stocks
text: With the service sector activity picking up in recent times, it's worth placing bets on stocks such as Barrett Business Services (BBSI), Shift4 Payments (FOUR), Carrols Restaurant Group (TAST), Brown & Brown (BRO) and Limbach (LMB).

title: Brown & Brown, Inc. enters into agreement to acquire Automotive Business Solutions
text: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla., Dec. 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- J. Scott Penny, chief acquisitions officer of Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO), and Michael Cox and Craig Sanford, the management owners of ABS Risk, LLC and ABS Operations, LLC (collectively, “ABS”), today announced that Brown & Brown Dealer Services has completed the acquisition of ABS.

title: 2 Insurance Stocks Poised for New 52-Highs in December
text: Aflac (AFL) and Brown & Brown (BRO) are two insurance stocks that look poised for new 52-week highs in December.
